title: • Trades must be approved by both parties.
content:
• Trades must be approved by both parties.
• Some items cannot be traded (ex: Legendary artifacts tied to specific quests).
• Trading history will be tracked.
• If a player abuses trades, their faction may penalize them.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures trading is strategic, not chaotic.
✔ Encourages faction negotiation & diplomacy.
✔ Prevents item hoarding by limiting trade opportunities.

📜 2. Leadership Exile – Permanently Banned from Their Faction, But Can Join Another

📜 Exiled leaders can try to join a new faction by offering something valuable.

✔ Exile Rules:
• If a leader is overthrown, they are permanently exiled from that faction.
• They may attempt to join a new faction, but they must offer an item, XP, or a significant sacrifice.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 509 (chunk 509/555)
